videos.title: My Daughter's Emotional 16th BIRTHDAY SURPRISE
videos.description:
SALISH TURNS 16 TODAY, and for the 5th year in a row her best friend Nidal flew to LA to surprise her. Thank you Khloe Kardashian, Kaido Lee Roberts, Txunamy, Mark Rober, Anazala Family, Dhar Mann, Rebecca Zamolo, Sofie Dossi, Ben Azelart, Matthew Beem, Elliana Walmsley , Starbucks, Sephora, L'Agence, Bulgari, and Creamy Boys Ice Cream for making this a very special birthday celebration. 

To win Salish's Sephora haul or the Sincerely Yours customized iPhone 17 by ZHC, make an edit using Sincerely Yours and tag 1) Salish 2) Sephora 3) Sincerely Yours. Terms and conditions apply: https://community.sephora.com/t5/Cust...

Get your own Crunch Labs Creative Kit at http://Crunchlabs.com/SALISH

Sincerely Yours is SOLD OUT on Sephora.com BUT you can still get it at https://sincerely-yours.com. Or try going to your local Sephora!! 

Follow Sincerely Yours:
Instagram @sincerelyyours https://www.instagram.com/sincerelyyo...
Tiktok: @sincerelyyours  https://www.tiktok.com/@sincerelyyour...   

Follow Salish on TikTok:   / salish  

Join our FREE text thread to get BTS photos and videos: https://joinsubtext.com/teamsalish! 

SUBSCRIBE:
Salish and dad:    / @jordanmatter

Follow our family on Instagram:
Salish:   / salishmatter  
Me:   / jordanmatter

Thumbnail design: @aamirdzn (twitter)

Subscribe to my Photo Challenges channel to see FATHER VS DAUGHTER:    / @jordanmatterphotochallenges  

MERCH: https://shopjordanmatter.com/

Business Inquiries: info@jordanmatter.com

videos.title: A emocionante SURPRESA DE ANIVERSÁRIO de 15 anos da minha filha
videos.description:
"Pelo quarto ano consecutivo, Nidal voou para Los Angeles para surpreender Salish em seu aniversário! Veja mais sobre o Knotts Scary Farm no canal do Nidal:    • Vídeo    Sign up for our FREE Team Salish text thread and you can help us decide what videos to film, see BTS photos and videos, and be the first to know when we’ve got something special happening: https://joinsubtext.com/teamsalish

Siga-nos no Instagram:
Salish:   / salishmatter  
Eu:   / jordanmatter  
Nidal:   / nidal.wonder_  

INSCREVER-SE:
Salish e eu:    / @jordanmatter    
Vlogs da Salish:    / @salishmatter  
Nidal:    / @nidalwonderofficial  

Arte da thumbnail: @aamirdzn (twitter)

Inscreva-se no meu canal Photo Challenges para ver PAI X FILHA:    / @jordanmatterphotochallenges  

MERCH: https://shopjordanmatter.com/

Contato para colaborações e mais informações: info@jordanmatter.com

Vídeo por Sandy Chase

Música licenciada por Artlist and Epidemic Sound

Uau, se você ainda está lendo isso, você é incrível! BUUUMMMM!!"
